claims: The skill description includes sending the entire codebase (all files) to an external AI service (Gemini) for analysis as part of its CI/CD automation process. While failure analysis is core to the skill's purpose, uploading the full repository to a third-party server may expose proprietary or sensitive code without clear necessity or user consent beyond the description. This data transfer is excessive compared to local or more targeted analysis methods that could achieve the same goal of intelligent failure recovery and root cause analysis.
